title: Molek #4432
definition:
Molech = "king"

 1) the god of the Ammonites and Phoenicians to whom some Israelites
    sacrificed their infants in the valley of Hinnom
nasbUsage:
Definition: Molech = "king"

 1) the god of the Ammonites and Phoenicians to whom some Israelites
    sacrificed their infants in the valley of Hinnom

    NASB:  a heathen god to whom Isr. sacrificed children
